item.name: Ut'ohmu Tiika
item.description:
Like a tiny tree, this saltwater fish sports a multitude of green, leaf-like fins.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Its name is a union of two tongues: the Xbr'aal “ut'ohmu” and the Mamool Ja “tiika.” That the Mamool Ja chose this appellation speaks volumes to their yearning for the forest above.
